prompt: # Housekeeping QR Report – Mobile Web App UI Specification---## 1. APP GOALDesign a **mobile web application UI** for hotel housekeeping staff to quickly report room cleaning status.App characteristics:* Extremely simple* Elderly-friendly* Large buttons, readable text* Linear flow only* No login* No side menu / no tab bar* Internal enterprise utility app* Optimized for mobile browserPrimary use case:```Scan QR → Take photos → Record voice → Submit → Success```---## 2. USER FLOW (MANDATORY)```Open App→ QR Scan Screen→ Camera Capture Screen→ Room Report Screen→ Success Screen→ Back to QR Scan Screen```Rules:* One main action per screen* Auto navigation when possible* No branching navigation* No dashboard---## 3. SCREEN FEATURES---### SCREEN 1 – QR SCAN**Purpose:** Identify room**UI Elements*** Page title: “Quét mã phòng”* Large QR scanner frame (4:3 ratio)* White corner brackets + subtle pulse animation* Instruction text below* Optional button: “Bắt đầu quét”**Behavior*** Successful scan → auto navigate to Camera Screen* Error → toast “Không quét được mã”---### SCREEN 2 – CAMERA CAPTURE**Purpose:** Capture proof photos**UI Elements*** Header title: “PHÒNG 401”* Subtitle: “Chụp ảnh sau khi dọn”* Large camera view* Big shutter button center bottom* Counter: `1 / 3`* Thumbnail preview row* Optional “Tiếp tục” button if < 3 photos**Rules*** Allow **1–3 photos*** At 3 photos → auto navigate Report* User can delete and retake---### SCREEN 3 – ROOM REPORT**Purpose:** Voice report + submit**UI Elements*** Header card: “PHÒNG 401”* Image list card (horizontal)* **Voice recording card (MAIN FOCUS)*** Optional small text input fallback* Sticky bottom CTA: “GỬI BÁO CÁO”**Voice Recording*** Large microphone button* Recording state label* Convert speech → text* Editable text**Validation*** Must have ≥1 image* Room ID required---### SCREEN 4 – SUCCESS**Purpose:** Confirmation**UI Elements*** Large success icon* Title: “Gửi báo cáo thành công”* Subtitle* Button: “Bắt đầu phòng mới”**Behavior*** Button → QR Screen* Optional auto redirect after 2–3 seconds---# 4. DESIGN SYSTEM (LOCK STYLE)---## LAYOUT* Screen background: `Linear gradient #F8F9FB → #FFFFFF`* Horizontal padding: **16px*** Section vertical spacing: **24px*** Card spacing: **16px**---## CARDS### Main Cards* Radius: **20px*** Background: `#E8F4FF`* Shadow: `0 8px 24px rgba(74,144,255,0.15)`* Padding: 16–20px### Secondary / Content Cards* Radius: **16px*** Background: **#FFFFFF*** Padding: 12–16px### Image Thumbnails* Radius: **12–16px**---## BUTTONS### Primary CTA* Full width minus 32px margin* Height: **52px*** Radius: **26px*** Background: `#4A90FF`* White text* Bold label### Icon Buttons* 48px circle* White background* Soft shadow### Touch Feedback* Scale `0.98` on press* Darken 10% background---## TYPOGRAPHY**Font Family*** iOS: SF Pro Display* Android: Roboto* Fallback: Inter / System Sans| Type       | Size | Weight | Color   || ---------- | ---- | ------ | ------- || Page Title | 18px | 600    | #111    || Card Title | 16px | 600    | #111    || Body Text  | 14px | 400    | #333    || Caption    | 12px | 400    | #6B7280 |* Line height rộng* Không dùng font mảnh---## SPECIAL COMPONENTS### QR Scanner* Ratio 4:3* White corner brackets* Subtle pulse animation* Soft blue overlay### Image List* Horizontal scroll* Thumbnail cards* Delete icon top-right### Voice Record Button* Large circular mic button* Blue background* Ripple / scale animation### Status Badges* Rounded pills* Small dot indicator* Soft pastel colors---## INTERACTIONS* Page transition: **Slide from right – 300ms*** Card press: **Scale 0.98 – 150ms*** Button press: **Darken 10%*** Auto navigation when tasks completed* Toast messages for errors---## CONSISTENCY RULES (STRICT)* Do not change radius values* Do not introduce new colors* Do not change typography scale* No dark mode* No glassmorphism* No neon / saturated palette* All screens must reuse the same card and but

def create_report(db: Session, data: ReportCreate) -> Report:
    report = Report(
        room_id=data.room_id,
        image_urls=data.image_urls,
        voice_text=data.voice_text,
    )
    db.add(report)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(report)
    return report

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS reports (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  room_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  image_urls JSON NOT NULL,
  voice_text TEXT,
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_room_id (room_id),
  INDEX idx_created_at (created_at)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

content.text:
Both servers are running clean. Here's a summary of everything built:

---

## What was built

### Backend
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `app/models/report.py` | `Report` SQLAlchemy model (`id`, `room_id`, `image_urls JSON`, `voice_text`, `created_at`) |
| `app/schemas/report.py` | Pydantic v2 `ReportCreate` / `ReportResponse` |
| `app/services/report_service.py` | `create_report()` service |
| `app/api/routes/reports.py` | `POST /api/reports` endpoint |
| `database/002_reports.sql` | MySQL migration (applied via MCP) |

### Frontend – 4 screens, single-page app

**Screen 1 – QR Scan**
- `jsQR` library decodes frames from the rear camera in real-time (200ms tick)
- Corner brackets pulse, scan line animates while active
- Toast on failure; auto-navigates on success

**Screen 2 – Camera Capture**
- Live rear camera feed in a full-bleed rounded viewport
- Shutter button captures JPEG blob → thumbnail strip (1–3 photos)
- At 3 photos → auto-navigates; "Tiếp tục" button for early exit

**Screen 3 – Room Report**
- Photo list card (horizontal scroll)
- Voice card: Web Speech API (`vi-VN`), animated wave bars while recording, transcript editable in `<textarea>`
- Optional extra notes field
- On submit: uploads each photo to S3 via presigned URL, then `POST /api/reports`

**Screen 4 – Success**
- Animated rings + checkmark pop-in
- Shows room ID, timestamp, photo count, voice status
- 3-second auto-redirect countdown back to QR screen

### Design system (locked)
- Font: **Nunito** (rounded, large-print friendly)
- `#4A90FF` blue primary, `#E8F4FF` card background, clean white/gray palette
- Cards: 20px / 16px radius, consistent shadows
- Slide-right 300ms screen transitions, shutter/mic/button press feedback

**Running at:** `http://localhost:8386` (frontend) · `http://localhost:2701` (backend)

### Manual test checklist
1. Tap "Bắt đầu quét" → allow camera → scan a QR code (any text works)
2. Take 1–3 photos with the shutter button → at 3 it auto-advances
3. Tap mic button → speak in Vietnamese → text appears in transcript
4. Tap "GỬI BÁO CÁO" → success screen with countdown
5. "Bắt đầu phòng mới" resets to QR screen
